Build configuration for compiling the JerryScript application on the Zephyr platform.

# Purpose
This Makefile is used to compile a software application. It includes a conditional statement that outputs "Compiling application" if the variable `V` is defined, which can be useful for debugging or logging purposes. The file sets an include path for JerryScript APIs by appending the `JERRY_INCLUDE` variable to `ZEPHYRINCLUDE`, ensuring that the compiler can locate the necessary header files. Additionally, it specifies object files `main-zephyr.o` and `getline-zephyr.o` to be included in the build process, indicating that these files are part of the application being compiled.
